array.string:
set -euo pipefail SRC="$HOME/.openread-dev/state.db" DST_DIR="$HOME/.openread-dev/backups" mkdir -p "$DST_DIR" if [ ! -f "$SRC" ]; then echo "backup: no state.db yet at $SRC — skipping" exit 0 fi STAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d) DST="$DST_DIR/state-$STAMP.db"
# Prefer SQLite online backup API via the sqlite3 CLI (consistent snapshot # even while WAL readers are active). Fall back to cp when sqlite3 is absent. if command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then sqlite3 "$SRC" ".backup '$DST'" else cp -p "$SRC" "$DST" fi
# Prune backups older than 30 days (mirrors retention.backupsDays default). find "$DST_DIR" -maxdepth 1 -name 'state-*.db' -type f -mtime +30 -print -delete echo "backup: wrote $DST"
